query:
SELECT 
  pipeline,
  lastSuccessfulSync,
  consecutiveFailures,
  updatedAt,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, lastSuccessfulSync, NOW()) as minutesSinceLastSync
FROM syncCheckpoints
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute 
SELECT 
  pipeline,
  lastSuccessfulSync,
  consecutiveFailures,
  updatedAt,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, lastSuccessfulSync, NOW()) as minutesSinceLastSync
FROM syncCheckpoints
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC;
